title: Super WebFlow Contract Language — Template Document
description: Schema for Super WebFlow template documents. Engines (Angular, Flutter) MUST validate incoming documents against this schema before rendering. See functional-spec.md for rules that cannot be expressed here.

SchemaVersion.description: Declares which version of the UI Contract Language this document uses.

Color.description: CSS color value (hex, rgb, rgba, hsl) or a ThemeColors token key (e.g. 'primary', 'surface'). Resolution order: theme token → raw CSS. See functional-spec §3.1.

SizeValue.description: Cross-platform dimension. number=px absolute; '%'=parent-relative; keywords=semantic. @webOnly: vw, vh. See functional-spec §3.2.

Spacing.description: Padding/margin shorthand. number=all sides; [v,h]=vertical+horizontal; [t,r,b,l]=each side; object=named sides. All values are absolute px.

FontSizeKey.description: Named scale key. Resolved via theme.typography.scale[key].

color.description: Raw CSS color value (not a token). Typically rgba().

StyleProps.description: Platform-agnostic style properties. Properties annotated @webOnly are silently ignored by the Flutter engine. See functional-spec §3.3.

fontFamily.description: 'heading' | 'body' | 'mono' resolved via theme; any other string used as-is.

lineClamp.description: Truncates text at N lines with ellipsis.

LayoutProps.description: Flex and Grid layout properties. Flex applies when 'direction' is set; Grid applies when 'columns' is set. See functional-spec §3.4.

stackIndex.description: Z-order within a 'stack' parent. Larger = on top.

TransformFn.description: A single transformation step in the DataBinding transform pipeline. Applied left-to-right. See functional-spec §5.2 for each transform's input/output contract.

DataCondition.description: Show/hide condition evaluated against the DataContext. See functional-spec §5.3.

value.description: The right-hand side of the comparison. Type must match the field's type.

or.description: OR group: at least one must be true.

and.description: AND group: all must be true.

DataBinding.description: Binds a node's content or attributes to DataContext values. See functional-spec §5.

listField.description: Array path. Node (and its children) is cloned once per array element.

itemAlias.description: Alias for the current list element in child nodes.

indexAlias.description: Alias for the current 0-based list index in child nodes.

fallback.description: Value used when field resolves to null, undefined, or empty string.

bindAttributes.description: Maps component prop names to DataContext paths: { 'src': 'coach.avatar' }.

limit.description: Maximum elements to render for listField.

Action.description: Command dispatched by an Interaction. Discriminated union on 'type'. See functional-spec §6.

BuilderMeta.description: Metadata used only by the builder UI. MUST be stripped and ignored by rendering engines.

ComponentNode.description: The fundamental unit of the component tree. Recursive via 'children'. See functional-spec §4 for rendering order.

id.description: MUST be unique within the entire TemplateDocument. See validation rule R01.

name.description: Human-readable label for builder UI only.

locked.description: Prevents the coach from editing this node in the builder.

children.description: MUST be present if data.listField is set (see rule R03).

props.description: Component-specific properties. Schema varies by 'type'. See functional-spec Appendix A for per-type prop definitions.

responsive.description: Breakpoint-specific style/layout overrides. MERGED onto base values (not replaced). Applied in ascending order: base→sm→md→lg→xl. See rule R14.

condition.description: If present and evaluates to false, the node is hidden. Children are not rendered. See rule R08 and functional-spec §5.3.

StyleLayoutOverride.description: Union of all StyleProps and LayoutProps fields. All optional. Applied as a deep merge onto the node's base style and layout at a given breakpoint.

id.description: Lowercase kebab-case identifier. Must start and end with alphanumeric.

dataSchema.description: Declares all DataContext fields available in this template. Keys use dot notation for namespacing: 'coach.name', 'coach.services'.

pages.description: 'home' is required. Additional pages use slug keys.
